text.title: AI Product Marketing Patterns Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply ai-product-marketing-patterns. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Audit current copy
step.description: Input: Marketing surface (site, deck, ads). Action: List claims + check for evidence.. Output: Claim audit..
step.note: Step 1. Required input: Marketing surface (site, deck, ads).

step.name: Pick patterns
step.description: Input: Claim audit + positioning canvas. Action: Choose patterns matching product context.. Output: Pattern selection..
step.note: Step 2. Required input: Claim audit + positioning canvas.

step.name: Rewrite copy
step.description: Input: Pattern selection. Action: Apply patterns; remove unverifiable claims.. Output: Revised copy..

step.name: Wire evidence
step.description: Input: Revised copy. Action: Link evals + demos + benchmarks; publish.. Output: Evidence-anchored copy..

step.name: Publish eval as asset
step.description: Input: Eval data + revised copy. Action: Author eval-asset page including limitations.. Output: Eval asset live..
step.note: Step 5. Required input: Eval data + revised copy.
